HGSS.392.0000:
Rt. 42 Ecruteak City
to Mahogany Town
HGSS.392.0003:
Rt. 42 Mahogany Town
to Ecruteak City
HGSS.392.0005:
Oh, boy!\f
Sorry that I bumped into you.\f
Did I hurt you?\f
Please don’t cry.
Here, take this.\f
HGSS.392.0006:
It’s a move called Strength!\f
When a Pokémon learns it, it can move
boulders out of your way.\r
Enjoy a happy mountain-climbing life!\f
HGSS.392.0007:
Eusine: SUICUNE...
How brave it is!\r
How refreshing it is!\r
How beautiful it is!\r
And how quickly it moves!\f
HGSS.392.0008:
[0103,0000,0000]!
You seem to be around where\r
SUICUNE would appear.\f
Well, that’s OK.
My desire to search for SUICUNE is\r
far beyond yours...\f
My grandpa was...quite into myths.
I’ve heard so many stories about\r
SUICUNE from him.\f
HGSS.392.0009:
SUICUNE...\f
I won’t stop following you until
I’ve found out what you’re after...\f
You hear me!\f
